titleStmt.title: SII 19.95: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 95. (A.R. No. 245 of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, NĀGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of the date given correspond to Thursday, 22nd April, A.D. 975. The first four lines of this inscription have been published in S.I.I., Vol. III (No. 129), where it has been assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa. The continuation has now been traced in situ and the full text is given below. It registers a sale of land by the mūlaparaḍai-perumakkaḷ of Tirukkuḍamukkil in Pāmbūr-nāḍu to the temple of Tirukkīkōṭṭattu-Paramasvāmi, for 25 kaḻañju which was the amount endowed to the temple for a perpetual lamp by Kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭi Aṟivāḷaṉ Amittiravalli of Tañjāvūr, on behalf of her son Kāri Koḻambaṉ of the Gaṇḍarāditta-teriñja-Kaikkōḷa (regiment). The land sold which was a quarter (vēli) extent, is said to have been the abhishēka-dakshiṇai received by the assembly evidently on the occasion of the king's coronation.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakeśaripatmaṟkku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu vaṭakaraip pām
pūrnāṭṭu tevatāṉam tirukkuṭamukkil mulaparaṭai perumakkaḷom Iyāṇṭu meṣaṉāyaṟṟū viyāḻakkiḻamaiyūm navamiyūm peṟṟa makattiṉṉāṉṟu tirukkuṭamukkil mulaparaṭaip perumakkaḷom tañcāvūrkkūṟṟattu tañcāvūrk kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭi
Aṟivāḷa ṉamittiravalli taṉ makaṉ kaṇṭarātittat teriñca kaiykkoḷaril kāri koḻam paṉaic cāttit tirukkiḻkkoṭṭattup paramasvāmikku vaiytta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟi ṉukku Ivaḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu
ṣekadakṣaṇai peṟṟa caṉṉa meṟkāviri ttirukkiḻkkoṭṭattu paramasvāmikku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattil Aḷantu mekāṟcey viṟṟukkuṭuttataṟ kellai Iddevar nilattukkey meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷukiṉṟa paramasvāmi nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkkellai Innilattukku pāyūm vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai Ipperumāḷ nilattukkey teṟkumāka Iv
ṭṭa nilam Aḷantu va kāṟce k kuṭuttu Ikkāṟceyyiṉ bhoganel koṇṭu cantrādittaval I nontāviḷakku Erippatāka Ivaḷiṭaik koṇṭa poṉ 2 10 5 Ippoṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻaiñcu Āvaṇakkaḷatte kaiccellak koṇṭu Ippoṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻaiñcum Emperumāṉ śrībhaṇṭārat ppittu Ittirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum Avvav Āṇṭu śrīkāryyañce
ppakkaṭavarākavum Ipparicup paṇitto mulaparaṭaipperumakkaḷom mula peru makkaḷ paṇiyāl I ṉeṉ Ivvūrt taccaṉ pirāntakaṉ Ari ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 19.95 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
